name: Savory Popcorn Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300°F.
2. Mix popcorn, pretzel sticks, nuts, and crackers in an ungreased 13 x 9-inch pan.
3. Mix remaining ingredients; drizzle over the popcorn mixture, tossing to coat evenly.
4. Bake for about 30 minutes, stirring every 10 minutes, until toasted.
5. Serve warm.
Microwave:
1. Prepare as above using a microwavable bowl.
2. Microwave, uncovered, on HIGH for 4-6 minutes, stirring every 2 minutes.
